The piece's character changes from tonic-cycling through m. 1–45 (surviving in this version as mm. 1–35) to this structural-bass post-pedal area.
The A note itself is neutral: it provides harmonic structure but has no chromatic color of its own. The voice leading and RH/LH balance are the teaching focus here, not any particular pitch-class's musical role.
The full phrase has 167 notes with 12 distinct pitch classes across mm. 1–48. The post-pedal area mm. 45–48 continues this chromatic LH/structural RH texture while moving toward the final cadence — a different character from the opening but within the same tonal framework.
